response.original_title: How do I get a refund from Norton? {{Easy~Guide}}
response.overview: To get a refund from Norton, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 first check if you are within their money-back guarantee period, which is typically 60 days from the date of purchase or auto-renewal charge, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 if you are outside this window, refunds become much harder to obtain, though not impossible, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 the most reliable way to request a refund is by calling Norton customer support directly at 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 because refunds are rarely processed through online forms or chat, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 be prepared for long wait times, often 20 to 40 minutes, and possible transfers between departments before reaching the billing team, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 when you reach an agent,
